title: echinocactus macrothele
intro: Echinocactus macrothele, commonly known as the 'Old Lady Cactus', is a species of cactus native to Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Echinocactus macrothele include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions or tinctures, have been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a medical professional.
